content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.recon
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/recon.py (495 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Reconnaissance Engine

"Good news, everyone! I've built a reconnaissance tool for authorized security testing!"

IMPORTANT: Only use on systems you own or have explicit written permission to test.

CLASSES:
- ReconType(Enum): Types of reconnaissance.
- DNSRecord: DNS record information.
- SubdomainInfo: Subdomain information.
- ServiceInfo: Service information from port scan.
- ReconResult: Complete reconnaissance result.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- ReconEngine: Reconnaissance engine for authorized security testing.

Capabilities:
- DNS enum
  Methods: async def scan(self, target: str, recon_type: ReconType=ReconType.PASSIVE, include_subdomains: bool=
  Methods: def generate_report(self, result: ReconResult) -> str
